name: Sauteed Kohlrabi
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the kohlrabi in a food processor or by hand.
2. Sprinkle with salt and allow to sit in a colander for 30 minutes. Squeeze water out.
3. Melt butter in a saute pan over medium heat.
4. Brown onions in the butter, stirring occasionally, until translucent.
5. Add grated kohlrabi to the pan and stir until it begins to soften.
6. Turn the heat down to low, cover the pan, and simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Uncover the pan and increase the heat back to medium.
8. Cook the kohlrabi for an additional 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Stir in the chopped fresh herbs (marjoram or basil) and cook for another minute.
10. Serve hot as a side dish or with your main course.
Note: We enjoy kohlrabi sliced thin and eaten raw; however, on cooler nights, this sauteed dish is a delightful complement to any meal.
